incorporations.original: I was brought once more before the Palais de Justice
incorporations.replacement: I was brought once more to the Palais de Justice
incorporations.reason: The Italian 'al Palazzo di Giustizia' uses the preposition 'al' (to the), not 'davanti al' (before). The Gemini draft correctly rendered 'to the Palace'; the final keeps the Claude draft's French form 'Palais de Justice' but adopts the more accurate preposition 'to'.

The Italian 'Cancelleria' is a specific administrative office in the prison, best rendered as 'Chancellery' — a direct cognate that preserves the institutional register. 'Governor's office' is an interpretive substitution that loses the original term.
Same correction as paragraph 10: consistent use of 'Chancellery' for Italian 'Cancelleria'.
The Italian source puts 'Times' in quotation marks as a publication title. Italicising it follows standard English typographic convention for newspaper names, as the Gemini draft did.
